business_definition: Share of valid funnel entrants that reach the terminal stage.
caveats: Descriptive synthetic funnel evidence; suppressed segment cells are excluded.
technical_definition: completed divided by entrants from fact_funnel_performance.

business_definition: Share of users who fail to progress from one funnel stage.
caveats: Right-censored journeys remain governed by funnel diagnostics.
technical_definition: prior stage users minus current stage users divided by prior stage users.

business_definition: Users active in a specific later period after joining a cohort.
technical_definition: retained users in period N divided by observed denominator.

business_definition: Users active in period N or any later observed period.
technical_definition: rolling retained users divided by observed denominator.

business_definition: Share of flagged users that actually churn in the label window.
caveats: Risk indicator only; not for automated adverse decisions.
technical_definition: true positives divided by predicted positives.

business_definition: Share of churners captured by the risk threshold.
technical_definition: true positives divided by actual positives.

business_definition: Share of eligible users assigned to a segment.
technical_definition: segment users divided by eligible users.

business_definition: Position-aware quality of top five recommendations.
caveats: Offline ranking metric, not a probability.
technical_definition: normalised discounted cumulative gain at K equals 5.

business_definition: Difference between treatment and control outcomes.
caveats: Decision also depends on power, SRM, integrity, and guardrails.
technical_definition: treatment value minus control value for the primary metric.

business_definition: Count of experiment decisions blocked by failed guardrails.
caveats: Guardrails can block rollout even when primary metric improves.
technical_definition: count rows where guardrail_status equals fail.

business_definition: Share of insight governance checks that pass.
caveats: Checks validate grounding and language constraints, not business truth.
technical_definition: passed checks divided by evaluated checks.

business_definition: Whether required reporting evidence passed validation.
caveats: Local deterministic validation; no Power BI deployment is performed.
